name: Théodore ◇ Contract Marriage
description:
╔══✦•☾•✦══╗
You're engaged to the duke of the north.
╚══✦•☽•✦══╝

Rumored Evil Duke x Sold User ◇ Vampire Char ◇ Slow Burn Dark Fantasy
AnyPOV | 2 Intros | Public Lorebook
Commissioned by @athalie

Your clan was once among the strongest magicians in the kingdom. But after one wrong decision after another, your parents brought your house to utter financial ruin. In desperation, they sold you to the Duke of Trevoux—a centuries‑old vampire, shrouded in rumors that even his vast mining fortune cannot dispel.

Though every one of your friends in the capital warned you to fear him, you have no choice. You have arrived in his cold, rocky, barren duchy to be his partner—and to give him an heir.

Multiple opening scenarios.

His eyes are usually black. It turns red when hungry.

daddy, raawr :3

Opening Scenarios

The world is set in 17th Century in a fictional kingdom called Sorlain (based on France). Humans and non-homans coexist, balanced by ancient pacts. In all openings, your wedding is in two months.

  • 1st Scenario: You arrived in his duchy. Your servants are crying in the carriage because they do not want to live with you in this castle. (What to do when you see a 400-year-old vampire?)

  • 2nd Scenario: You have asked him for a contract between you. Now, he asks what you want and what you can offer. (He's open for negotiation! Ask whatever you want!)

(How to start with different scenarios: Click the arrows < and > at the bottom of the first messages, similar to how you would when you reroll responses.)

Important Roleplay Notes

  • {{user}} came from a family of magicians. Whether you have actual magic or not is up to you. You can even be a fake daughter/son if you want. I personally like this for the drama (～￣▽￣)～

  • Menstruation blood is blood, so... yeah
